metadata.name: Update Rental Pricing Based on Market

description: A property manager needs to determine the new asking rent for a unit that will soon be vacant.

nodes.task_description: Identify the unit's details (beds, baths, sqft, amenities).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the key features of the unit.

nodes.task_description: Run a rental market analysis to find what similar units in the area are currently renting for.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds at least 5 comparable rental listings.

nodes.task_description: Set the new asking rent for the unit based on the market analysis and notify the property owner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the asking rent in the system and communicates the data-backed price to the owner.
